title: In glitzy interwar Warsaw, truth meets fiction as 2 young women hunt for missing mentor
description:
In 'The Last Woman of Warsaw,' out April 7, author Judy Batalion shows the Jewish diversity of the cosmopolitan city as an odd couple sets out to solve a mystery
The post In glitzy interwar Warsaw, truth meets fiction as 2 young women hunt for missing mentor appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: IDF admits Tehran synagogue was ‘collateral damage’ in strike on Iran commander
description:
Army says it regrets damage to Rafi Niya synagogue; video from site shows rescuers handling what looks like book of Hebrew scripture found in the rubble
The post IDF admits Tehran synagogue was collateral damage in strike on Iran commander appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: Crossing the ‘Line of Death’ at 2,125 MPH: SR-71 Battle Damage Assessment after ‘El Dorado Canyon’
description: In the aftermath of Operation El Dorado Canyon, the Lockheed SR-71 Blackbird was sent across Qaddafi’s Line of Death for a high-risk overflight of Libya to deliver critical battle damage assessment. title: Updated: A-10 Thunderbolt II Crashed Near the Strait of Hormuz, U.S. Officials Tell NYT
description: Almost the same time as an F-15E Strike Eagle went down over Iran, the U.S. Air Force lost an A-10 Thunderbolt II attack aircraft near the Strait of Hormuz. title: David Hogg's PAC leaves some Dem campaigns fuming
description: Leaders We Deserve, the PAC founded by David Hogg to elect young progressives in Democratic primaries, is leaving some of the campaigns it endorsed griping about alleged broken promises.Why it matters: Multiple campaigns backed by Hogg's PAC fumed after primary losses that the group dangled hopes of financial commitments that never materialized.First it was Irene Shin: The Washington Post reported last July that Leaders We Deserve backed off a co

title: Israel approves major expansion of Arrow interceptor production
description: Israel’s Ministry of Defence (IMOD) has received approval to accelerate Arrow interceptor missile production.

title: Trump interested in calling on Arab states to help pay for Iran war, White House says
description: “I think it’s something the President would be quite interested in calling them to do,” press secretary Karoline Leavitt said on Monday.

title: Iran-backed Iraqi armed group release kidnapped US journalist
description: An Iran-backed Iraqi armed group has released an American journalist abducted in Baghdad last week, an Iraqi official said on Tuesday. The group had earlier agreed to release the journalist in a gesture of goodwill toward Iraq’s outgoing prime minister.
